basics.name: Aden Guo
basics.label: Software Engineer · Geomatics Engineering Graduate
basics.summary: Full-stack and systems developer who ships production web platforms, source-grounded AI products, and agentic CLI tooling across TypeScript, Python, and Rust. Comfortable owning a feature end to end — schema and retrieval layer through API to deployed UI — on Postgres/pgvector, FastAPI, and Next.js. Geomatics engineering background grounds the work in rigorous data analysis and spatial reasoning.

work.name: University of Calgary
work.summary: Led a team project evaluating surveying methods for disc golf course mapping and delivered final technical findings.
highlights: Compared RTK GNSS, range finder, and odometer techniques to assess mapping accuracy and efficiency.
Operated drones for photogrammetric capture and executed spatial intersection workflows for 3D modeling.
Processed and validated geospatial datasets with photogrammetry tools and Python-based analysis pipelines.
Authored and presented the final report at the SaGES Project Presentation.

work.name: Gongcha
work.summary: Managed high-volume shift operations while training team members on standardized service workflows.
highlights: Trained and mentored staff to improve consistency and teamwork.
Balanced service demands and operational tasks under time constraints.
Strengthened team coordination, problem-solving, and day-to-day execution.

courses: Photogrammetry, 3D modeling, and digital imaging workflows
Geospatial data analysis, error modeling, and quality control
Spatial database design, SQL, and geospatial data mining
Project management, technical reporting, and collaborative problem-solving
Applied geomatics workflow through capstone and ENGO 500 field survey camp

projects.name: Glass Atlas — Source-Grounded RAG Knowledge Site
projects.description: Deployed SvelteKit 2 (Svelte 5 runes) editorial site that turns a personal note library into a conversational, citation-backed assistant.
highlights: Engineered hybrid semantic + lexical retrieval over Neon PostgreSQL with pgvector (cosine similarity) and Drizzle ORM, with confidence-tiered fallbacks that keep every answer grounded in source notes.
Built streaming RAG chat through OpenRouter (Gemini 2.0 Flash) on text-embedding-3-small 1536-dim vectors, with strict-TypeScript end-to-end typing.
Shipped on Railway with a Bun HTTP server, Auth.js GitHub OAuth, and private S3-compatible storage via presigned URLs.

projects.name: Weather & Wellness — UBC Research Platform
projects.description: Production multi-tenant research platform for a UBC Psychology lab where research assistants run validated psychological instruments with anonymous participants.
highlights: Built a Next.js 15 / React 19 frontend and FastAPI backend that auto-scores validated instruments (digit span, loneliness, depression, anxiety) in real time.
Implemented weather–psychology mixed-effects models with statsmodels, NumPy, and Pandas over per-lab isolated datasets.
Architected per-lab data isolation on Supabase Postgres/Auth with Upstash Redis, shipped to production at ubcpsych.com.
